rationale: The citing paper’s core method is an incentive-aligned upgrading procedure with BDM-based willingness-to-pay elicitation, so a prior JMR paper on “Measuring Consumers’ WTP” via BDM is highly likely to be a methodological foundation rather than a casual mention. The cited note explicitly centers on BDM’s incentive compatibility and practical validity in marketing contexts, which directly matches the citing paper’s focal constructs and design logic.
